name: Cheesy Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Package of Cream Cheese, cut into cubes
1/2 tbsp Garlic Salt ( I now use garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the pork chops with the seasoned flour.
2. Brown the pork chops in butter or margarine.
3. In a separate pan, heat milk and add cream cheese, garlic salt, and 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese. Mix well until blended.
4. Place the pork chops in an 12x8 baking dish.
5. Cover the pork chops with the sauce mixture.
6. Sprinkle 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese on top.
7. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes, or until the pork chops are tender. Enjoy J
